headline: A Look At NVR (NVR) Valuation After Soft Q1 2026 Results And New US$750 Million Buyback
summary: Why NVR's latest buyback and earnings report matter for investors NVR (NVR) recently authorized a new share repurchase program of up to US$750 million alongside a fiscal first quarter 2026 update that showed earnings and homebuilding revenue under pressure. For you as a shareholder or potential buyer, that mix of weaker reported results and a sizeable, open ended buyback raises practical questions about how management is allocating capital and what it might mean for per share metrics over...
